name: Maiko | Cosplaying Stepmom
description:
"I tried to do a bit of cosplaying, but it seemed like this old outfit doesn't fit my body anymore~"

Let's just end it off with a milf cus why not. Don't really know what I'm gonna do at 1k but ehhh fuck it we ball.

If you want the bot's definition to use with tavernai,etc... please contact me on discord. You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.
